Matthijs de Ligt is considering a move to Manchester United because he believes there are parallels between the Red Devils and Ajax.

The 19-year-old had been expected to join Barcelona after a sensational season as captain of Ajax which saw the Dutch giants knock out Real Madrid and Juventus en route to the Champions League semi-finals.

However, Barcelona’s confidence over a deal decreased over time as de Ligt’s agent, Mino Raiola, ramped up interest from across Europe as all eyes fixed on Ajax.

Manchester United are reported to have offered the defender substantially better terms than Barcelona are prepared to pay as the Red Devils seek to compensate for not being able to offer the Dutchman Champions League football next term.

Nevertheless, Barcelona had been expected to win the race but the Telegraph report that a move to Old Trafford appeals to De Ligt because he’d be at the centre of the rebuild.


The 19-year-old was made Ajax captain at the age of 18 and he believes he can help United in much the same way during their own rebuilding project.

De Ligt is also concerned that he won’t be a guaranteed starter at Barcelona given the greater strength in depth at the Camp Nou, while he’d be Ole Gunnar Solskjaer’s first choice centre-back.

It’s claimed De Ligt will make a decision on his future in the ‘coming days’ and that United – though realistic about the chances of him going to Barcelona – still believe he could end up at Old Trafford

【Now Sports-體育】AC米蘭前主帥加度素日前正式與球會結束合作關係，麾下一眾球員滿是不捨之情，紛紛在網上撰文向他道別。

加度素（Gennaro Gattuso）帶領AC米蘭衝擊下季歐聯失敗後，最終難逃被炒厄運。他在離隊曾發出聲明：「離開AC米蘭是痛苦的決定，絕不容易，但我必須這樣做。」此外，有傳他決定放棄餘下兩年合約中9成人工，盡顯對AC米蘭的情義。 這位有「鬥牛梗」之稱的熱血主帥離職，旗下一眾球員相當不捨。後衛列卡度洛迪古斯在Instagram撰文：「多謝你對我的信任和教導。你是一個特別的人，擁有偉大及正確的價值觀、為人誠實，永遠都會付出一切。」中場基斯爾則說：「在每天的操練中，你都奉上一切，多謝mister。」 至於今季為AC米蘭射入8球的蘇素亦發文：「真正的男人及領袖。因為你，我明白了很多東西，包括甚麼是AC米蘭。你是一名特別的教練，祝你好運。」

Matthijs de Ligt is considering a move to Manchester United because he believes there are parallels between the Red Devils and Ajax.

The 19-year-old had been expected to join Barcelona after a sensational season as captain of Ajax which saw the Dutch giants knock out Real Madrid and Juventus en route to the Champions League semi-finals.

However, Barcelona’s confidence over a deal decreased over time as de Ligt’s agent, Mino Raiola, ramped up interest from across Europe as all eyes fixed on Ajax.

Manchester United are reported to have offered the defender substantially better terms than Barcelona are prepared to pay as the Red Devils seek to compensate for not being able to offer the Dutchman Champions League football next term.

Nevertheless, Barcelona had been expected to win the race but the Telegraph report that a move to Old Trafford appeals to De Ligt because he’d be at the centre of the rebuild.


The 19-year-old was made Ajax captain at the age of 18 and he believes he can help United in much the same way during their own rebuilding project.

De Ligt is also concerned that he won’t be a guaranteed starter at Barcelona given the greater strength in depth at the Camp Nou, while he’d be Ole Gunnar Solskjaer’s first choice centre-back.

It’s claimed De Ligt will make a decision on his future in the ‘coming days’ and that United – though realistic about the chances of him going to Barcelona – still believe he could end up at Old Trafford
